name: smp-kat-tools
description: Medical-education exam-prep toolkit. Bundles medical-acquisition (21 backends, USyd OpenAthens), examiner-feedback-mining (RACGP / ACRRM / AMC patterns), distractor-design (72-entry taxonomy plus 5 KFP buckets), kfp-failure-bucket (8-bucket failure router). Slash commands: /smp-kat-tools:acquire, /smp-kat-tools:kfp-stem, /smp-kat-tools:refresh-capabilities. Subagents: acquisition-fetcher, exam-stem-author.
